title: Nonam
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Nonam.jpg]] |name=Nonam |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Dark]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Pale |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Captain Nonam, are your ground troops standing by?"
"They await your order, sir. The Rebel scum are ''doomed''.|General Mohc and Captain Nonam during the attack on Tak Base|{{Tales|4|Sand Blasted}}}} [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Nonam''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] military officer serving the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He served under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Rom Mohc]] aboard the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']]. He was involved in deploying the [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark troopers]] during the [[attack on Tak Base]]. ==Appearances== *{{Tales|4|Sand Blasted}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Nonam |pl=Nonam |uk=Нонам }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Army officers of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Males]]
